activity_summary.terms_text: Ndiyaqonda ukuba ulwazi olunikelwe kolu luhlu ayenzelwanga ukuthatha indawo yengcebiso, uxilongo, okanye unyango olunikwa ngugqirha okanye ingcali yempilo yengqondo, kwaye iimpendulo zam ezingachazwanga zisenokusetyenziswa kwaye kwabelwane ngazo kuphando ngokubanzi ngempilo yengqondo yabantwana.
activity_summary.footer_text: KUNYE NOKWENZA UNYANGO LWENGQONDO YOMNTWANA, I-PLLC (KUNYE, “I-CMI”) AYIWENZI NGQO OKANYE NGINGQONDO NGENGQONDO OKANYE IKHIWE INGCEBISO ZEZONYANGO NJENGXALENYE LWEMIBUZO. I-CMI AYIQINISEKI NGAYO NALUPHI UXANDUVA, UNYANGO, ISIGQIBO EESENZELWEYO, OKANYE INYATHELO ELITHATYATHIWEYO NGOKUXHOMEKELA KULWAZI LWEMIBUZO, KWAYE AYIQINISEKI UXANDUVA LOKUSEBENZISA LE MIBUZO.
activity_summary.category_suicide_message: Umzali wabonisa ukuba kunokwenzeka ukuxhatshazwa. Zisa kugqirha ngokukhawuleza ngenxa yemeko engxamisekileyo.
activity_summary.category_sport_message: Yazisa ugqirha; Yenza uvavanyo lokulandelela (Kuyacetyiswa); Yenza ukuthunyelwa.

about_app.curious_about:
## 
 ### Yintoni uCurious? 

 Le app yinxalenye yomthombo ovulelekileyo wokuqokelelwa kwedatha kunye neqonga lohlalutyo eliyilwe yi-MATTER Lab kwiziko leNgqondo yoMntwana ([https://matter.childmind.org](https://matter.childmind.org)). 
 # 
 ### Yintoni enokwenziwa nguCurious? 

 Iseti yenqaku leCurious iyakhula, kwaye okwangoku ixhasa iintlobo ngeentlobo zegalelo. Isikrini ngasinye kumsebenzi onomdla sinokubandakanya nayiphi na kwezi zilandelayo: 
  -Umbhalo, umfanekiso kunye nesandi 
  - Umbuzo olandelwa ngumfanekiso kunye/okanye ukhetho lokuphendula okubhaliweyo 
  -Ibha yesilayidi 
  - Ungeniso lokubhaliweyo 
  - Ungeno lwetheyibhile 
  - Irekhodi yomsindo 
  -Ukuthathwa kwefoto/ividiyo 
  - Ukuzoba okanye ukucofa 
  -I-geolocation yangoku 
  - Umsebenzi wengqiqo olula 
  - Libazise phambi kwempendulo 
  - Isibali-xesha 
  -Ingqiqo yoxhomekeko yokumisela ukuba ungaya phi ngokulandelayo 

 #### Ndingafunda phi ngakumbi? 
 Nceda ndwendwela [https://gettingcurious.com] (https://gettingcurious.com) ngolwazi olungakumbi.  
 ## [Inkxaso] ({{credits_link}}) 
 ## [Imiqathango yenkonzo] (https://gettingcurious.com/terms) 
 ## [Umgaqo-nkqubo wabucala](https://gettingcurious.com/privacy-policy) 

 ##### Masinwabe, 

 ##### Iqela elinomdla 

 ##### i-Child Mind Institute

umncedisi welifu, kunye nokufikelela kolu lwazi ngeenjongo zeklinikhi kunye nophando

Ndivumela iZiko leeNgqondo zaBantwana ukuba liqhagamshelane nam malunga nolwazi oluqokelelwe kulo
le app ngeenjongo zeklinikhi okanye zophando.

geolocation.must_enable_location: Kufuneka uvule iinkonzo zeNdawo ukugqiba lo msebenzi. Nceda unike imvume yeCurious kwiiSetingi zakho ze-iOS kwaye ucinezele iqhosha kwakhona.

permissions.alarm_permission_disabled: Nceda uvule iimvume ze-alam kwisixhobo sakho ukuze ufumane izikhumbuzi zeCurious kwishedyuli. Nceda uqaphele ukuba usetyenziso luya kuvalwa ngokuzenzekelayo wakube uvule iimvume ze-alam.

dialog.body: Ukwabelana ngeempendulo esidlangalaleni kuthetha ukuba ulwazi olunikezelwe ngabasebenzisi ngabanye, njengeempendulo zophando okanye ingxelo, luya kufumaneka ngokuvulelekileyo ukuze abanye bajongwe.

assignment.banner: Nceda uqinisekise ukuba zonke iimpendulo zakho zimalunga{{name}}

requestHealthRecordData.title: Cela iData yeRekhodi yezeMpilo
requestHealthRecordData.linkText: Funda ngakumbi malunga nendlela Curious efikelela ngokukhuselekileyo kwidatha yenkathalo yezempilo.
requestHealthRecordData.partnershipText:
Unomdla usebenzisa i-1upHealth's Medical Information Service ukwenza ukuba umphandi wakho afikelele kulwazi kwiirekhodi zakho zokhathalelo lwempilo.

Kwezi zikrini zilandelayo, uya kucelwa ukuba ungene kwiinkqubo zakho zoBonelelo lwezeMpilo kwaye wabelane ngedatha yakho yokhathalelo lwempilo nolu phononongo. Uya kubuyela kumsebenzi weCurious xa ugqibile.
requestHealthRecordData.additionalPromptText:
Ugqibile ukungena kwi-akhawunti yakho yokhathalelo lwempilo.

Ngaba ungathanda ukungena kuzo naziphi na ii-akhawunti zokhathalelo lwempilo ezongezelelweyo?
requestHealthRecordData.noResults: Akukho baBoneleli bezeMpilo bafunyenwe behambelana nophendlo lwakho.

announcementBanner.content: <0>Uhlaziyo loyilo lusendleleni</0> <1> - usetyenziso oluhle olufanayo, inkangeleko entsha. Cofa </1> <2>ukufunda ngakumbi.</2>

unity.error_message: Umsebenzi awuphumelelanga, nceda uqhagamshelane nombhali ngoncedo. Umsebenzi uya kuphuma ngoku.
unity.error_message_flow: Umsebenzi awuphumelelanga, nceda uqhagamshelane nombhali ngoncedo. Uya kusiwa kumsebenzi olandelayo ekuhambeni:
unity.restart_message:
Umsebenzi ufumene impazamo enkulu kwaye kufuneka uphume. Idatha eqokelelwe kulo msebenzi ukuza kuthi ga ngoku iya kulahleka.

Ungawuqala kwakhona umsebenzi ukuze uzame kwakhona.
